data.title: Implement skill-trace-analyze.py script
data.description:
## Description
Create plugins/dso/scripts/skill-trace-analyze.py:
- Parse /tmp/dso-skill-trace-*.log (newest first or by --session arg)
- Detect unmatched SKILL_INVOKE entries (no corresponding SKILL_RESUMED) → classify as CONTROL_LOSS
- For CONTROL_LOSS sessions, evaluate H1-H10 thresholds and classify each as confirmed/refuted/insufficient-data
- Handle malformed input gracefully (skip unparseable lines)
- Output JSON diagnostic report to stdout
- chmod +x with #!/usr/bin/env python3
- Remove RED marker from .test-index after tests pass
- Add negative hook assertion: no hook files reference the trace mechanism

## TDD Requirement
Implementation task — RED tests from Task 2 must pass (GREEN) after this.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/skill-trace-analyze.py
- [ ] Accessible via dso shim
  Verify: $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/scripts/dso skill-trace-analyze.py --help
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: grep 'skill-trace-analyze' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -v '\[' | grep -q 'skill-trace-analyze'
- [ ] All synthetic tests pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-skill-trace-analyze.sh
- [ ] No hook files reference trace mechanism
  Verify: grep -r 'skill-trace' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/ | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
